---
title: "Major-General Edmund Neal Wilford"
---

## Major-General Edmund Neal Wilford

**Dates:** (1800-15 Dec 1881)

### Description

father of Florence Wilford

### Biography

He served in the Royal Artillery and was Governor of the Royal Military Academy, Woolwich; he died at his residence at St. Leonard's on Sea, . [<i>The Times</i>, 19 Dec 1881 9f; ]

### Letters

- Letter from July 2, 1881.
- Letter from Feb 26th 1880
- Letter from Aug 16th [1867]
- Letter from Oct 30th [1865]
- Letter from June 4th 1859

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
